channel.title: Posts on Topo-grapher Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Topo-grapher Blog

item.title: How to Import a Toposolid into Revit (Without the Headache)
item.description: Bring real site terrain into Revit as a native toposolid you can actually edit, not a locked IFC. Here's how, and why it saves hours per project.
